input: I'm launching an AI tool for real estate agents that automatically drafts property listings from photos and specs. How should I get my first 10 paying customers?
criteria: recommends a specific first channel — not a list of 10 channels
the recommended channel is realistic for a solo founder with no existing audience
includes a specific outreach or distribution tactic (not just 'do content marketing')
sets a realistic timeline for first 10 customers
addresses why real estate agents specifically would pay vs use ChatGPT themselves
no generic startup advice that would apply to any product
judge_prompt: You are evaluating a go-to-market strategy from an AI strategy assistant. Score 0-10. This tests specificity and realism. Full marks: one focused channel with a concrete tactic, timeline given, real estate agent buying behavior addressed, no generic advice that could apply to any product. Deduct 3 if 10+ channels listed with no priority. Deduct 2 for generic advice ('build in public', 'SEO'). Deduct 2 if no specific outreach tactic.
